DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-09-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HUY KHONG'S DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is overruled.

On January 16, 2019, Plaintiff and Defendant were involved in a motor vehicle accident. (First Amended Complaint, pg. 4.) Emergency Rule of Court 9 adopted by the Judicial Council provides that "the statutes of limitations and repose for civil causes of action that exceed 180 days are tolled from April 6, 2020, until October 1, 2020." (Cal. Rules of Court, App. I, Rule 9.) The two-year statute of limitations for personal injury actions in Code of Civil Procedure section 335.1 obviously exceeds 180 days. Tolling of statutes of limitations will "suspend or extend a statute of limitations . . . ." (McDonald v. Antelope Valley Community College Dist. (2008) 45 Cal.4th 88, 99.) Accordingly, Defendant does not show that Plaintiff's February 11, 2021 complaint was untimely. Defendant is admonished for failing to meet and confer before filing the demurrer as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 430.41.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-09-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HUY KHONG'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is denied.

The Court has overruled Defendant's demurrer on statute of limitations grounds. Defendant does not offer any independent ground for striking Plaintiff's claims for damages. Defendant is admonished for its failure to meet and confer before filing the motion to strike, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 435.5.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
